archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted with Saffron for approachable utility

rules: Never use Inter. Rely on Outfit for energetic, approachable headings and DM Sans for highly readable body text.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF6B1A] text-white hover:bg-[#E65A12] font-semibold rounded-xl py-3 px-6 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#111827] border border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50 font-semibold rounded-xl py-3 px-6
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#FF6B1A] hover:bg-[#FFF0E6] font-semibold rounded-xl py-3 px-6

inputs.default: w-full border border-gray-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF6B1A] focus:border-transparent transition-all

cards.default: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm p-4 md:p-6

mobile_navigation.bottom_tabs: fixed bottom-0 w-full bg-white border-t border-gray-100 flex justify-around items-center py-3 pb-safe shadow-[0_-4px_6px_-1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]

web_navigation.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen w-64 bg-[#111827] text-white flex flex-col border-r border-gray-800
web_navigation.nav_item: flex items-center px-4 py-3 mx-2 rounded-xl text-gray-300 hover:bg-[#1F2937] hover:text-white transition-colors
web_navigation.nav_item_active: flex items-center px-4 py-3 mx-2 rounded-xl bg-[#1F2937] text-[#FF6B1A] font-medium

media.icons_strategy: Use Lucide React icons. Use stroke-width 2 for clarity. For industry categories, use prominent icons surrounded by a light orange background circle (bg-[#FFF0E6] text-[#FF6B1A]).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the user's provided visual structure. For mobile: clean white background cards on an off-white app background. For Web: Dark sidebar with light content dashboard.
Implement the 4-digit mock OTP screen exactly as described. Any 4-digit number should pass authentication.
On the language selection screen, build fully functioning English, Hindi, and Kannada options. All other language chips must display a 'Coming Soon' toast or disabled state.
For the web portal forms (Post Job, Add New Person), utilize heavily customized Shadcn components (Inputs, Select, Sliders) with rounded-xl radii and #FF6B1A focus states.
Ensure all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, language selectors, bottom tabs) include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
For dummy jobs data, seed realistic blue-collar job titles (e.g., 'Senior Electrician', 'Warehouse Manager', 'Forklift Operator', 'Site Mason') and reasonable salary ranges.
